# GoldRush Skills — Full Reference (with code)
> 132 skills with complete TypeScript snippets for the GoldRush API (by Covalent).

This is the full version of llms.txt — each skill includes its ready-to-use TypeScript snippet.
Lightweight index (no snippets): https://skills.goldrush.dev/llms.txt

GoldRush (by Covalent) is a unified blockchain data API supporting 200+ EVM and non-EVM chains.
SDK: @covalenthq/client-sdk  |  UI Kit: @covalenthq/goldrush-kit  |  Docs: https://goldrush.dev/docs

## Quick start
```typescript
import { GoldRushClient } from "@covalenthq/client-sdk";
const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
```

## Skills — Full Reference

### Wallet (22 skills)

**bitcoin-balance-checker**
  Description: Fetch confirmed UTXOs, current balance, and USD value for any Bitcoin address.
  Use case: Build a Bitcoin balance widget that shows confirmed BTC balance and live USD value for any Bitcoin address — no chainName parameter needed.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/btc-mainnet/address/{walletAddress}/balances/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: bitcoin
  Key params: walletAddress (Bitcoin address (P2PKH, P2SH, bech32) — no chainName needed, always btc-mainnet)
  Response fields: items[].address, items[].balance, items[].quote, items[].quote_rate
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/bitcoin-balance-checker
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function getBitcoinBalance(btcAddress: string) {
    // No chainName parameter — Bitcoin is hardcoded to btc-mainnet
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getBitcoinNonHdWalletBalances(btcAddress);
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    const item = resp.data.items[0];
    return {
      address: item.address,
      balanceSatoshi: item.balance,
      balanceBtc: Number(item.balance) / 1e8,
      usdValue: item.quote,
      btcPriceUsd: item.quote_rate,
    };
  }
  
  // Example usage
  const balance = await getBitcoinBalance('1A1zP1eP5QGefi2DMPTfTL5SLmv7Divf');
  console.log(`BTC: ${balance.balanceBtc} (~$${balance.usdValue?.toFixed(2)})`);
  
  ```

**bitcoin-hd-wallet-scanner**
  Description: Enumerate all derived addresses and balances from a Bitcoin xpub/ypub/zpub HD wallet key.
  Use case: Scan an entire Bitcoin HD wallet from a single xpub/ypub/zpub key — discover all derived addresses, their balances, and total BTC holdings without exposing private keys.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/btc-mainnet/address/{xpub}/balances_hd/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: bitcoin
  Key params: walletAddress (Bitcoin HD wallet extended public key — xpub, ypub, or zpub format)
  Response fields: items[].address, items[].balance, items[].quote, items[].account, items[].index
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/bitcoin-hd-wallet-scanner
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function scanHdWallet(xpub: string) {
    // Pass xpub/ypub/zpub as the wallet address — no chainName parameter
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getBitcoinHdWalletBalances(xpub);
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    const addresses = resp.data.items;
    const totalSatoshi = addresses.reduce((sum, a) => sum + Number(a.balance ?? 0), 0);
  
    return {
      totalBtc: totalSatoshi / 1e8,
      addressCount: addresses.length,
      addresses: addresses.map(a => ({
        address: a.address,
        balanceBtc: Number(a.balance) / 1e8,
        account: a.account,
        index: a.index,
      })),
    };
  }
  ```

**bitcoin-transaction-explorer**
  Description: Paginated transaction history for any Bitcoin address — inputs, outputs, fees, and confirmation status.
  Use case: Build a Bitcoin transaction explorer that shows the full UTXO history for any address — inputs, outputs, fees, and amounts in BTC and USD.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/btc-mainnet/address/{walletAddress}/transactions/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: bitcoin
  Key params: walletAddress (Bitcoin address (P2PKH, P2SH, or bech32)), pageNumber (Page number starting from 0 for pagination)
  Response fields: items[].block_signed_at, items[].tx_hash, items[].value, items[].fees, items[].inputs[].address, items[].inputs[].value, items[].outputs[].address, items[].outputs[].value
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/bitcoin-transaction-explorer
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function getBitcoinTransactions(btcAddress: string, pageNumber = 0) {
    const resp = await client.TransactionService.getTransactionsForBtcAddress(
      btcAddress,
      pageNumber
    );
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    return resp.data.items.map(tx => ({
      txHash: tx.tx_hash,
      timestamp: tx.block_signed_at,
      valueBtc: Number(tx.value) / 1e8,
      feeBtc: Number(tx.fees) / 1e8,
      inputs: (tx.inputs ?? []).map(i => ({ address: i.address, valueBtc: Number(i.value) / 1e8 })),
      outputs: (tx.outputs ?? []).map(o => ({ address: o.address, valueBtc: Number(o.value) / 1e8 })),
    }));
  }
  ```

**crypto-tax-exporter**
  Description: Export a complete CSV of all ERC-20 transfers and transactions with USD cost basis for tax reporting — Koinly/CoinTracker compatible.
  Use case: Build a one-click tax report tool that exports every buy, sell, and transfer with USD values at time of transaction for any wallet address.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transfers_v2/, GET /v1/pricing/historical_by_addresses_v2/{chainName}/{quoteCurrency}/{contractAddress}/
  Cost: 0.05/item (transfers) + 1/call (prices)
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  Key params: chainName (EVM chain name — foundational chains preferred for historical price accuracy), walletAddress (0x wallet address to export transfers for), year (Tax year filter — only include transfers from this calendar year), pageNumber (0-indexed page number for paginating through all transfers)
  Response fields: items[].transfers[].block_signed_at, items[].transfers[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].transfers[].delta, items[].transfers[].quote, items[].transfers[].tx_hash, items[].transfers[].from_address, items[].transfers[].to_address, items[].transfers[].contract_decimals
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/crypto-tax-exporter
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  interface TaxRow {
    date: string; type: string; asset: string;
    amount: string; usd_value: string; tx_hash: string;
    from: string; to: string;
  }
  
  async function exportTaxCSV(chainName: string, walletAddress: string, year: number): Promise<string> {
    const rows: TaxRow[] = [];
    let page = 0;
    let hasMore = true;
  
    while (hasMore) {
      const resp = await client.BalanceService.getErc20TransfersForWalletAddress(
        chainName, walletAddress, { pageNumber: page }
      );
      const items = resp.data?.items ?? [];
      if (items.length === 0) { hasMore = false; break; }
  
      for (const item of items) {
        for (const t of item.transfers ?? []) {
          const txYear = new Date(t.block_signed_at!).getFullYear();
          if (txYear !== year) continue;
          const amount = Number(t.delta) / Math.pow(10, t.contract_decimals ?? 18);
          rows.push({
            date: new Date(t.block_signed_at!).toISOString(),
            type: t.from_address?.toLowerCase() === walletAddress.toLowerCase() ? 'SEND' : 'RECEIVE',
            asset: t.contract_ticker_symbol ?? '',
            amount: amount.toFixed(8),
            usd_value: (t.quote ?? 0).toFixed(2),
            tx_hash: t.tx_hash ?? '',
            from: t.from_address ?? '',
            to: t.to_address ?? '',
          });
        }
      }
      page++;
      hasMore = items.length >= 100;
    }
  
    const header = 'date,type,asset,amount,usd_value,tx_hash,from,to';
    const csvRows = rows.map(r => Object.values(r).join(','));
    return [header, ...csvRows].join('\n');
  }
  ```

**wallet-erc20-transfers**
  Description: Fetch full ERC-20 transfer history for any wallet, optionally filtered by token contract.
  Use case: Build a complete token transfer timeline showing every ERC-20 sent and received with USD amounts — perfect for tax reporting tools and portfolio trackers.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transfers_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum, avalanche, gnosis +11 more
  Key params: chainName (EVM chain identifier (e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, matic-mainnet)), walletAddress (0x wallet address or ENS name), contractAddress (Optional ERC-20 contract address to filter transfers for a specific token)
  Response fields: items[].transfers[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].transfers[].from_address, items[].transfers[].to_address, items[].transfers[].contract_decimals, items[].transfers[].delta, items[].transfers[].quote, items[].transfers[].block_signed_at, items[].transfers[].tx_hash
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/wallet-erc20-transfers
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function getErc20Transfers(chainName: string, walletAddress: string) {
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getErc20TransfersForWalletAddress(
      chainName,
      walletAddress
    );
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    const transfers = resp.data.items.flatMap(item =>
      (item.transfers ?? []).map(t => ({
        symbol: t.contract_ticker_symbol,
        from: t.from_address,
        to: t.to_address,
        amount: Number(t.delta) / 10 ** (t.contract_decimals ?? 18),
        usdValue: t.quote,
        txHash: t.tx_hash,
        timestamp: t.block_signed_at,
      }))
    );
  
    return transfers.sort(
      (a, b) => new Date(b.timestamp!).getTime() - new Date(a.timestamp!).getTime()
    );
  }
  ```

**historical-portfolio-value**
  Description: 30-day rolling historical portfolio value with open/close/high/low per token per day — build P&L charts, portfolio performance dashboards, and DeFi fund trackers.
  Use case: Build a 30-day portfolio performance chart with per-token OHLC data — show gains, losses, and asset allocation change over time.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/portfolio_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  Key params: chainName (Foundational EVM chain only: eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet), walletAddress (0x wallet address or ENS name)
  Response fields: items[].contract_name, items[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].holdings[].timestamp, items[].holdings[].open.quote, items[].holdings[].high.quote, items[].holdings[].low.quote, items[].holdings[].close.quote
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/historical-portfolio-value
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function getHistoricalPortfolio(chainName: string, walletAddress: string) {
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getHistoricalPortfolioForWalletAddress(
      chainName,
      walletAddress
    );
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    return resp.data.items.map(token => ({
      name: token.contract_name,
      symbol: token.contract_ticker_symbol,
      history: (token.holdings ?? []).map(h => ({
        date: h.timestamp,
        open: h.open?.quote ?? 0,
        high: h.high?.quote ?? 0,
        low: h.low?.quote ?? 0,
        close: h.close?.quote ?? 0,
      })),
    }));
  }
  ```

**historical-token-holdings**
  Description: Snapshot of every ERC-20 token balance and USD value at any past date — foundational chains only.
  Use case: Reconstruct a wallet's exact token holdings at any past date — essential for tax calculations, historical P&L reports, and portfolio audits.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/historical_balances/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  Key params: chainName (Foundational chain only: eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet), walletAddress (0x wallet address)
  Response fields: items[].contract_name, items[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].holdings[].timestamp, items[].holdings[].quote_rate, items[].holdings[].close.balance
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/historical-token-holdings
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function getHistoricalTokenHoldings(chainName: string, walletAddress: string) {
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getHistoricalTokenBalancesForWalletAddress(
      chainName,
      walletAddress
    );
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    return resp.data.items.map(token => ({
      name: token.contract_name,
      symbol: token.contract_ticker_symbol,
      history: (token.holdings ?? []).map(h => ({
        timestamp: h.timestamp,
        priceUsd: h.quote_rate,
        balance: h.close?.balance,
        usdValue: h.quote_rate && h.close?.balance
          ? (Number(h.close.balance) / 1e18) * h.quote_rate
          : null,
      })),
    }));
  }
  ```

**multi-wallet-aggregator**
  Description: Enter multiple wallet addresses and see combined token balances, total net worth, and unified transaction feed — your whole onchain life in one view.
  Use case: Build a household/team portfolio dashboard that aggregates assets across multiple wallets and shows combined USD net worth, per-wallet breakdown, and top holdings.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_v2/, GET /v1/address/{walletAddress}/balances_all_chains/
  Cost: 1 credit/wallet/chain
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, arbitrum, avalanche, gnosis
  Key params: walletAddresses (Array of 0x wallet addresses to aggregate across), chainName (EVM chain name — or use multichain endpoint to auto-discover all chains)
  Response fields: items[].contract_name, items[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].contract_address, items[].balance, items[].quote, items[].quote_rate, items[].logo_url
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/multi-wallet-aggregator
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  interface AggregatedToken {
    symbol: string; name: string; logoUrl: string;
    totalBalance: number; totalQuote: number;
    wallets: Array<{ address: string; balance: number; quote: number }>;
  }
  
  async function aggregateMultiWallet(walletAddresses: string[], chainName: string) {
    const results = await Promise.all(
      walletAddresses.map(addr =>
        client.BalanceService.getTokenBalancesForWalletAddress(chainName, addr)
          .then(r => ({ addr, items: r.data?.items ?? [] }))
      )
    );
  
    const tokenMap = new Map<string, AggregatedToken>();
  
    for (const { addr, items } of results) {
      for (const token of items) {
        if (token.is_spam) continue;
        const key = token.contract_address ?? token.contract_ticker_symbol ?? '';
        const existing = tokenMap.get(key) ?? {
          symbol: token.contract_ticker_symbol ?? '',
          name: token.contract_name ?? '',
          logoUrl: token.logo_url ?? '',
          totalBalance: 0, totalQuote: 0, wallets: [],
        };
        const bal = Number(token.balance) / Math.pow(10, token.contract_decimals ?? 18);
        existing.totalBalance += bal;
        existing.totalQuote += token.quote ?? 0;
        existing.wallets.push({ address: addr, balance: bal, quote: token.quote ?? 0 });
        tokenMap.set(key, existing);
      }
    }
  
    const tokens = [...tokenMap.values()].sort((a, b) => b.totalQuote - a.totalQuote);
    const totalNetWorth = tokens.reduce((s, t) => s + t.totalQuote, 0);
    return { totalNetWorth, tokenCount: tokens.length, tokens };
  }
  ```

**native-token-balance**
  Description: Lightweight check for the native token balance (ETH, MATIC, BNB, etc.) of any wallet across any chain.
  Use case: Check if a wallet has enough native gas token to cover a transaction before sending — gate app actions by a minimum ETH/MATIC/BNB balance threshold.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_native/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum, avalanche, gnosis +11 more
  Key params: chainName (EVM chain identifier (e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, matic-mainnet)), walletAddress (0x wallet address or ENS name)
  Response fields: items[].contract_name, items[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].balance, items[].quote, items[].quote_rate
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/native-token-balance
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function getNativeBalance(chainName: string, walletAddress: string) {
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getNativeTokenBalance(
      chainName,
      walletAddress
    );
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    const item = resp.data.items[0];
    return {
      symbol: item.contract_ticker_symbol,
      balance: Number(item.balance) / 1e18,
      usdValue: item.quote,
      priceUsd: item.quote_rate,
    };
  }
  ```

**net-worth-calculator**
  Description: Calculate total wallet net worth across all EVM and non-EVM chains instantly.
  Use case: Show a user their total crypto net worth in USD across every chain they hold assets on — the one-call portfolio summary widget.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/address/{walletAddress}/balances/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum, avalanche, gnosis +11 more
  Key params: walletAddress (0x wallet address to aggregate balances across all chains)
  Response fields: items[].chain_name, items[].items[].contract_name, items[].items[].balance, items[].items[].quote
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/net-worth-calculator
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function getNetWorth(walletAddress: string) {
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getTokenBalances(walletAddress);
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    let totalUsd = 0;
    const byChain: Record<string, number> = {};
  
    for (const chain of resp.data.items) {
      const chainTotal = chain.items.reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.quote ?? 0), 0);
      byChain[chain.chain_name] = chainTotal;
      totalUsd += chainTotal;
    }
  
    return { totalUsd, byChain };
  }
  ```

**portfolio-history**
  Description: 30-day historical portfolio value over time — asset-by-asset breakdown per day.
  Use case: Render a stacked area chart of total portfolio value over 30 days — ideal for fund dashboards and DeFi performance trackers.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/portfolio_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  Key params: chainName (Foundational chain only: eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet), walletAddress (0x wallet address or ENS name)
  Response fields: items[].contract_name, items[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].holdings[].timestamp, items[].holdings[].open.quote, items[].holdings[].close.quote
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/portfolio-history
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function getPortfolioHistory(chainName: string, walletAddress: string) {
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getHistoricalPortfolioForWalletAddress(
      chainName,
      walletAddress
    );
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    const dailyTotals: Record<string, number> = {};
    for (const token of resp.data.items) {
      for (const h of token.holdings ?? []) {
        const day = String(h.timestamp).slice(0, 10);
        dailyTotals[day] = (dailyTotals[day] ?? 0) + (h.close?.quote ?? 0);
      }
    }
    return Object.entries(dailyTotals)
      .sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b))
      .map(([date, totalUsd]) => ({ date, totalUsd }));
  }
  ```

**portfolio-performance-report**
  Description: 30-day rolling P&L report with per-token open/high/low/close — build fund-grade performance dashboards for any wallet on foundational chains.
  Use case: Build a hedge fund-style monthly performance report showing each token's 30-day price range, unrealized gain/loss, and portfolio allocation shift.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/portfolio_v2/
  Cost: 2 credits/item
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  Key params: chainName (Foundational chain only — eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet), walletAddress (0x wallet address for the performance report)
  Response fields: items[].contract_name, items[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].holdings[].timestamp, items[].holdings[].open.quote, items[].holdings[].high.quote, items[].holdings[].low.quote, items[].holdings[].close.quote
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/portfolio-performance-report
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  interface TokenPerf {
    name: string; symbol: string;
    startValue: number; endValue: number;
    high30d: number; low30d: number;
    pnl: number; pnlPct: number;
  }
  
  async function buildPerformanceReport(chainName: string, walletAddress: string) {
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getHistoricalPortfolioForWalletAddress(
      chainName, walletAddress
    );
    const items = resp.data?.items ?? [];
  
    const tokenPerf: TokenPerf[] = items
      .filter(item => (item.holdings?.length ?? 0) > 1)
      .map(item => {
        const holdings = item.holdings!;
        const startValue = holdings[0].close?.quote ?? 0;
        const endValue = holdings[holdings.length - 1].close?.quote ?? 0;
        const high30d = Math.max(...holdings.map(h => h.high?.quote ?? 0));
        const low30d = Math.min(...holdings.filter(h => (h.low?.quote ?? 0) > 0).map(h => h.low!.quote!));
        const pnl = endValue - startValue;
        const pnlPct = startValue > 0 ? (pnl / startValue) * 100 : 0;
        return {
          name: item.contract_name ?? '',
          symbol: item.contract_ticker_symbol ?? '',
          startValue, endValue, high30d, low30d, pnl, pnlPct,
        };
      })
      .sort((a, b) => b.pnl - a.pnl);
  
    const totalPnl = tokenPerf.reduce((s, t) => s + t.pnl, 0);
    const totalEndValue = tokenPerf.reduce((s, t) => s + t.endValue, 0);
    return { totalPnl, totalEndValue, positions: tokenPerf };
  }
  ```

**portfolio-tracker**
  Description: Monitor multi-chain portfolio value and asset composition in real time.
  Use case: Build a real-time portfolio dashboard that shows every asset a wallet holds with live USD prices and spam tokens filtered out automatically.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum, avalanche, gnosis +11 more
  Key params: chainName (EVM chain identifier (e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, matic-mainnet)), walletAddress (0x wallet address or ENS name)
  Response fields: items[].contract_name, items[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].contract_address, items[].contract_decimals, items[].balance, items[].quote, items[].quote_rate, items[].logo_url, items[].is_spam, items[].type
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/portfolio-tracker
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function getPortfolio(chainName: string, walletAddress: string) {
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getTokenBalancesForWalletAddress(
      chainName,
      walletAddress
    );
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    const tokens = resp.data.items
      .filter(t => !t.is_spam && (t.quote ?? 0) > 0)
      .map(t => ({
        name: t.contract_name,
        symbol: t.contract_ticker_symbol,
        balance: Number(t.balance) / 10 ** (t.contract_decimals ?? 18),
        usdValue: t.quote,
        logo: t.logo_url,
      }));
  
    const totalUsd = tokens.reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.usdValue ?? 0), 0);
    return { totalUsd, tokens };
  }
  ```

**solana-staking-snapshot**
  Description: Query a Solana wallet's complete staking picture: native stake accounts (active, activating, deactivating, inactive) pulled from the on-chain stake program, plus liquid staking positions in mSOL (Marinade), jitoSOL (Jito), bSOL (Sanctum), and stSOL (Lido). Returns stake amount in SOL, activation epoch, estimated APY, and claimable rewards for each position — build a staking dashboard, rewards calculator, or unstaking automation agent in one view.
  Use case: Build a Solana staking dashboard that aggregates native stake accounts and liquid staking positions (mSOL, jitoSOL, bSOL) with estimated APY and claimable rewards in one view.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  Key params: address (The Solana wallet address to snapshot staking positions for), nft (Set to false to exclude NFTs and focus on fungible staking tokens), no_spam (Set to true to filter spam tokens from the response)
  Response fields: items[].contract_name, items[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].contract_address, items[].balance, items[].contract_decimals, items[].quote_rate, items[].quote, items[].logo_url
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-staking-snapshot
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const LIQUID_STAKING_TOKENS: Record<string, { protocol: string; estimatedApy: number }> = {
    mSoLzYCxHdYgdzU16g5QSh3i5K3z3KZK7ytfqcJm7So: { protocol: 'Marinade', estimatedApy: 6.8 },
    J1toso1uCk3RLmjorhTtrVwY9HJ7X8V9yYac6Y7kGCPn: { protocol: 'Jito', estimatedApy: 7.2 },
    bSo13r4TkiE4KumL71LsHTPpL2euBYLFx6h9HP3piy1: { protocol: 'Sanctum', estimatedApy: 6.5 },
  };
  
  interface StakingPosition {
    protocol: string;
    tokenSymbol: string;
    balanceSol: number;
    valueUsd: number;
    estimatedApy: number;
    tokenAddress: string;
  }
  
  async function getStakingSnapshot(walletAddress: string): Promise<StakingPosition[]> {
    const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getTokenBalancesForWalletAddress(
      'solana-mainnet',
      walletAddress,
      { nft: false, noSpam: true }
    );
  
    if (resp.error) {
      console.error('GoldRush error:', resp.error_message);
      return [];
    }
  
    const tokens = resp.data?.items ?? [];
    const positions: StakingPosition[] = [];
  
    for (const token of tokens) {
      const addr = token.contract_address ?? '';
      const stakingInfo = LIQUID_STAKING_TOKENS[addr];
      if (!stakingInfo) continue;
  
      const balanceSol =
        Number(token.balance ?? 0) / Math.pow(10, token.contract_decimals ?? 9);
  
      positions.push({
        protocol: stakingInfo.protocol,
        tokenSymbol: token.contract_ticker_symbol ?? '',
        balanceSol: parseFloat(balanceSol.toFixed(4)),
        valueUsd: Number(token.quote ?? 0),
        estimatedApy: stakingInfo.estimatedApy,
        tokenAddress: addr,
      });
    }
  
    const totalStaked = positions.reduce((s, p) => s + p.balanceSol, 0);
    console.log(`Found ${positions.length} staking positions, total: ${totalStaked.toFixed(4)} SOL`);
    return positions;
  }
  
  // Usage
  getStakingSnapshot('7Np41oeYqPefeAfUZx9j5yCLrMQZMDyApbJAKhgQFMRm').then((positions) => {
    positions.forEach((p) => console.log(`${p.protocol}: ${p.balanceSol} SOL @ ${p.estimatedApy}% APY`));
  });
  ```

**solana-transaction-history**
  Description: Fetch paginated Solana transaction history via `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/transactions_v3/` — each transaction is decoded with the top-level program name (Jupiter, Raydium, System, Token, etc.), SOL fee paid, success/fail status, block time, and a human-readable summary. Paginate with `page` and `page-size` params. Build a complete Solana activity feed or trading journal without ever parsing raw instruction data.
  Use case: Build a decoded Solana transaction activity feed that shows program names, instruction types, fees, and status for any wallet without any raw instruction parsing.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: solana
  Key params: address (The Solana wallet address to fetch transaction history for), page_size (Number of transactions per page (max 100)), page (Page index for pagination (starts at 0)), block_signed_at_asc (Set to true for oldest-first ordering, false (default) for newest-first)
  Response fields: items[].tx_hash, items[].block_signed_at, items[].block_height, items[].successful, items[].from_address, items[].fees_paid, items[].value, items[].log_events[].sender_name, items[].log_events[].decoded.name, items[].log_events[].decoded.params[].name, items[].log_events[].decoded.params[].value, pagination.total_count, pagination.page_number
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-transaction-history
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  interface SolanaTx {
    txHash: string;
    blockTime: string;
    programName: string;
    instructionType: string;
    feePaidSol: number;
    successful: boolean;
  }
  
  async function getSolanaTransactionHistory(
    walletAddress: string,
    page = 0,
    pageSize = 25
  ): Promise<{ txs: SolanaTx[]; totalCount: number }> {
    const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
    const resp = await client.TransactionService.getTransactionsForAddressV3(
      'solana-mainnet',
      walletAddress,
      { page, pageSize }
    );
  
    if (resp.error) {
      console.error('GoldRush error:', resp.error_message);
      return { txs: [], totalCount: 0 };
    }
  
    const items = resp.data?.items ?? [];
    const totalCount = resp.data?.pagination?.total_count ?? items.length;
  
    const txs: SolanaTx[] = items.map((tx) => ({
      txHash: tx.tx_hash ?? '',
      blockTime: tx.block_signed_at ?? '',
      programName: tx.log_events?.[0]?.sender_name ?? 'System',
      instructionType: tx.log_events?.[0]?.decoded?.name ?? 'transfer',
      feePaidSol: Number(tx.fees_paid ?? 0) / 1e9,
      successful: tx.successful ?? false,
    }));
  
    return { txs, totalCount };
  }
  
  // Usage
  getSolanaTransactionHistory('7Np41oeYqPefeAfUZx9j5yCLrMQZMDyApbJAKhgQFMRm', 0, 10).then(
    ({ txs, totalCount }) => {
      console.log(`Showing ${txs.length} of ${totalCount} total transactions`);
      txs.forEach((tx) =>
        console.log(
          `${tx.programName} | ${tx.instructionType} | ${tx.successful ? 'OK' : 'FAIL'} | ${tx.blockTime}`
        )
      );
    }
  );
  ```

**solana-wallet-age-activity**
  Description: Use `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/transactions_v3/?page-size=1&sort=asc` to find the wallet's first-ever transaction (creation date), then the summary endpoint for total tx count and unique programs interacted with. Returns: first tx date, total lifetime transaction count, top 5 most-called programs, and days since last activity — foundational data for Solana wallet scoring, sybil detection, onchain identity badges, and airdrop eligibility checks.
  Use case: Build a Solana wallet age and activity scorer for sybil detection, airdrop eligibility checks, and onchain identity badges using first transaction date and lifetime interaction data.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: solana
  Key params: address (The Solana wallet address to analyze for age and activity signals), page_size (Use 1 with ascending sort to find the first-ever transaction efficiently), block_signed_at_asc (Set to true to retrieve the oldest transaction for wallet age calculation)
  Response fields: items[].tx_hash, items[].block_signed_at, items[].successful, items[].from_address, items[].log_events[].sender_name, pagination.total_count, pagination.page_number
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-wallet-age-activity
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  interface WalletAgeActivity {
    walletAddress: string;
    firstTxDate: string;
    walletAgeMonths: number;
    totalTxCount: number;
    daysSinceLastActivity: number;
    topPrograms: Array<{ name: string; count: number }>;
    activityScore: number;
  }
  
  async function getWalletAgeActivity(walletAddress: string): Promise<WalletAgeActivity | null> {
    const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
    const [recentResp, oldestResp] = await Promise.all([
      client.TransactionService.getTransactionsForAddressV3('solana-mainnet', walletAddress, { pageSize: 100 }),
      client.TransactionService.getTransactionsForAddressV3('solana-mainnet', walletAddress, { pageSize: 1 }),
    ]);
  
    if (recentResp.error) {
      console.error('GoldRush error:', recentResp.error_message);
      return null;
    }
  
    const recentTxs = recentResp.data?.items ?? [];
    const totalTxCount = recentResp.data?.pagination?.total_count ?? recentTxs.length;
    const newestTx = recentTxs[0];
    const oldestTx = oldestResp.data?.items?.[0];
  
    const firstTxDate = oldestTx?.block_signed_at ?? newestTx?.block_signed_at ?? '';
    const walletAgeMonths = firstTxDate
      ? Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(firstTxDate).getTime()) / (30 * 24 * 3600 * 1000))
      : 0;
  
    const lastActivityDate = newestTx?.block_signed_at ?? '';
    const daysSinceLastActivity = lastActivityDate
      ? Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastActivityDate).getTime()) / 86_400_000)
      : 999;
  
    const programCounts = new Map<string, number>();
    for (const tx of recentTxs) {
      const prog = tx.log_events?.[0]?.sender_name ?? 'System';
      programCounts.set(prog, (programCounts.get(prog) ?? 0) + 1);
    }
    const topPrograms = Array.from(programCounts.entries())
      .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
      .slice(0, 5)
      .map(([name, count]) => ({ name, count }));
  
    const activityScore = Math.min(
      Math.round(walletAgeMonths * 5 + Math.log10(Math.max(totalTxCount, 1)) * 20 + (daysSinceLastActivity < 30 ? 10 : 0)),
      100
    );
  
    return { walletAddress, firstTxDate, walletAgeMonths, totalTxCount, daysSinceLastActivity, topPrograms, activityScore };
  }
  
  // Usage
  getWalletAgeActivity('7Np41oeYqPefeAfUZx9j5yCLrMQZMDyApbJAKhgQFMRm').then((data) => {
    if (data) {
      console.log(`Age: ${data.walletAgeMonths} months | Txs: ${data.totalTxCount} | Score: ${data.activityScore}/100`);
      data.topPrograms.forEach((p) => console.log(`  ${p.name}: ${p.count} calls`));
    }
  });
  ```

**solana-wallet-balances**
  Description: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/balances_v2/` with your GoldRush API key to retrieve every SPL token held — including name, symbol, logo URI, raw balance, decimals, current USD price, and total USD value per token. Handles associated token accounts (ATAs) automatically with no manual derivation. Add `nft=false` to filter out NFTs and return pure fungible token holdings. Build a full Solana portfolio UI in under 50 lines of TypeScript.
  Use case: Build a full Solana portfolio UI that lists every SPL token with its USD value and logo, automatically handling all associated token accounts, in under 50 lines of TypeScript.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: solana
  Key params: address (The Solana wallet address to retrieve token balances for), nft (Set to false to exclude NFTs and return only fungible token holdings), no_spam (Set to true to filter out spam or dust token accounts)
  Response fields: address, updated_at, quote_currency, chain_name, items[].contract_decimals, items[].contract_name, items[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].contract_address, items[].logo_url, items[].balance, items[].quote_rate, items[].quote
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-wallet-balances
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  interface SPLTokenBalance {
    name: string;
    symbol: string;
    logoUrl: string;
    contractAddress: string;
    balance: string;
    balanceFormatted: number;
    priceUsd: number;
    valueUsd: number;
  }
  
  interface WalletBalances {
    walletAddress: string;
    totalNetWorthUsd: number;
    tokenCount: number;
    tokens: SPLTokenBalance[];
  }
  
  async function getSolanaWalletBalances(walletAddress: string): Promise<WalletBalances | null> {
    const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getTokenBalancesForWalletAddress(
      'solana-mainnet',
      walletAddress,
      { nft: false, noSpam: true }
    );
  
    if (resp.error) {
      console.error('GoldRush error:', resp.error_message);
      return null;
    }
  
    const items = resp.data?.items ?? [];
  
    const tokens: SPLTokenBalance[] = items.map((token) => {
      const decimals = token.contract_decimals ?? 0;
      const rawBalance = token.balance ?? '0';
      const balanceFormatted = Number(rawBalance) / Math.pow(10, decimals);
      return {
        name: token.contract_name ?? '',
        symbol: token.contract_ticker_symbol ?? '',
        logoUrl: token.logo_url ?? '',
        contractAddress: token.contract_address ?? '',
        balance: rawBalance,
        balanceFormatted: parseFloat(balanceFormatted.toFixed(6)),
        priceUsd: Number(token.quote_rate ?? 0),
        valueUsd: Number(token.quote ?? 0),
      };
    });
  
    const totalNetWorthUsd = tokens.reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.valueUsd, 0);
  
    return {
      walletAddress,
      totalNetWorthUsd: parseFloat(totalNetWorthUsd.toFixed(2)),
      tokenCount: tokens.length,
      tokens: tokens.sort((a, b) => b.valueUsd - a.valueUsd),
    };
  }
  
  // Usage
  getSolanaWalletBalances('7Np41oeYqPefeAfUZx9j5yCLrMQZMDyApbJAKhgQFMRm').then((balances) => {
    if (balances) {
      console.log(`Net worth: $${balances.totalNetWorthUsd} across ${balances.tokenCount} tokens`);
      balances.tokens.slice(0, 5).forEach((t) =>
        console.log(`  ${t.symbol}: ${t.balanceFormatted} ($${t.valueUsd.toFixed(2)})`)
      );
    }
  });
  ```

**transaction-history**
  Description: Paginated, decoded transaction history with logs for any wallet or contract address.
  Use case: Build a paginated transaction feed showing decoded event names, ETH value, gas paid, and success status — the core of any wallet explorer or activity page.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum, avalanche, gnosis +11 more
  Key params: chainName (EVM chain identifier (e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet)), walletAddress (0x wallet address), pageNumber (Page index starting from 0)
  Response fields: items[].block_signed_at, items[].tx_hash, items[].from_address, items[].to_address, items[].value, items[].value_quote, items[].gas_spent, items[].fees_paid, items[].successful, items[].log_events[].decoded.name, items[].log_events[].decoded.params[]
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/transaction-history
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function getTransactionHistory(
    chainName: string,
    walletAddress: string,
    pageNumber = 0
  ) {
    const resp = await client.TransactionService.getTransactionsForAddressV3(
      chainName,
      walletAddress,
      pageNumber
    );
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    return resp.data.items.map(tx => ({
      hash: tx.tx_hash,
      timestamp: tx.block_signed_at,
      from: tx.from_address,
      to: tx.to_address,
      valueEth: Number(tx.value) / 1e18,
      valueUsd: tx.value_quote,
      gasUsed: tx.gas_spent,
      success: tx.successful,
      events: (tx.log_events ?? []).map(e => e.decoded?.name).filter(Boolean),
    }));
  }
  ```

**wallet-activity-feed**
  Description: Stream live wallet events and transaction activity across any supported chain.
  Use case: Add a live activity feed to a wallet dashboard that pushes incoming and outgoing transfers instantly without polling — using the GoldRush streaming WebSocket.
  Endpoints: wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — walletTxs subscription
  Cost: Streaming subscription
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum, avalanche, gnosis +8 more
  Key params: walletAddress (0x wallet address to subscribe to), chainName (EVM chain name (e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet))
  Response fields: txHash, blockSignedAt, value, fromAddress, toAddress, transfers[].tokenSymbol, transfers[].delta
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/wallet-activity-feed
  ```typescript
  import { createClient } from 'graphql-ws';
  
  const wsClient = createClient({
    url: 'wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql',
    connectionParams: { apiKey: process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY },
  });
  
  function subscribeWalletFeed(walletAddress: string, chainName: string) {
    return wsClient.iterate({
      query: `subscription WalletFeed($addr: String!, $chain: String!) {
        walletTxs(walletAddress: $addr, chainName: $chain) {
          txHash blockSignedAt value fromAddress toAddress
          transfers { tokenSymbol delta }
        }
      }`,
      variables: { addr: walletAddress, chain: chainName },
    });
  }
  
  for await (const event of subscribeWalletFeed('0xYourWallet', 'eth-mainnet')) {
    console.log('New tx:', event.data?.walletTxs);
  }
  ```

**wallet-age-summary**
  Description: Get first and last transaction date, total transaction count, and gas spent for any wallet — the foundation for wallet age verification and on-chain identity.
  Use case: Build a wallet age badge for a DeFi app — show how long a wallet has been active and its total transaction count as a trust and Sybil-resistance signal.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transactions_summary/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum, avalanche, gnosis +11 more
  Key params: chainName (EVM chain identifier (e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet)), walletAddress (0x wallet address)
  Response fields: items[].total_count, items[].earliest_transaction.block_signed_at, items[].earliest_transaction.tx_hash, items[].latest_transaction.block_signed_at, items[].latest_transaction.tx_hash
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/wallet-age-summary
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function getWalletAgeSummary(chainName: string, walletAddress: string) {
    const resp = await client.TransactionService.getTransactionSummary(
      chainName,
      walletAddress
    );
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    const summary = resp.data.items[0];
    const firstTx = summary.earliest_transaction?.block_signed_at;
    const ageInDays = firstTx
      ? Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(firstTx).getTime()) / 86_400_000)
      : 0;
  
    return {
      totalTransactions: summary.total_count,
      firstTransaction: firstTx,
      latestTransaction: summary.latest_transaction?.block_signed_at,
      walletAgeInDays: ageInDays,
    };
  }
  ```

**wallet-balances-skill**
  Description: Fetch token balances and portfolio state for any wallet across 100+ chains.
  Use case: Build a multi-chain token portfolio dashboard that shows every asset a wallet holds with live USD prices.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum, avalanche, gnosis +11 more
  Key params: chainName (EVM chain identifier (e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, matic-mainnet)), walletAddress (0x wallet address or ENS name)
  Response fields: items[].contract_name, items[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].contract_address, items[].contract_decimals, items[].balance, items[].quote, items[].quote_rate, items[].logo_url, items[].is_spam, items[].type
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/wallet-balances-skill
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function getWalletBalances(chainName: string, walletAddress: string) {
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getTokenBalancesForWalletAddress(
      chainName,
      walletAddress
    );
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    return resp.data.items
      .filter(item => !item.is_spam)
      .map(item => ({
        name: item.contract_name,
        symbol: item.contract_ticker_symbol,
        balance: Number(item.balance) / 10 ** (item.contract_decimals ?? 18),
        usdValue: item.quote,
        logo: item.logo_url,
      }));
  }
  ```

**wallet-pnl-tracker**
  Description: Unrealized P&L for every token in a wallet — shows entry price, current price, and total gain/loss per position.
  Use case: Build an unrealized P&L dashboard that shows every open token position — entry cost, current value, and total gain/loss in USD — for any wallet in real time.
  Endpoints: wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — upnlForWallet query
  Cost: Streaming query
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, arbitrum, optimism
  Key params: walletAddress (0x wallet address to fetch P&L for), chainName (EVM chain name (e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet))
  Response fields: totalUnrealizedPnl, tokens[].symbol, tokens[].pnl, tokens[].balance, tokens[].currentPrice
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/wallet-pnl-tracker
  ```typescript
  import { createClient } from 'graphql-ws';
  
  const wsClient = createClient({
    url: 'wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql',
    connectionParams: { apiKey: process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY },
  });
  
  async function getWalletPnl(walletAddress: string, chainName: string) {
    // upnlForWallet is a query (single response), not a subscription
    const result = await new Promise<any>((resolve, reject) => {
      wsClient.subscribe(
        {
          query: `query WalletPnl($addr: String!, $chain: String!) {
            upnlForWallet(walletAddress: $addr, chainName: $chain) {
              totalUnrealizedPnl
              tokens { symbol pnl balance currentPrice }
            }
          }`,
          variables: { addr: walletAddress, chain: chainName },
        },
        {
          next: (data) => resolve(data.data?.upnlForWallet),
          error: reject,
          complete: () => {},
        }
      );
    });
  
    return {
      totalPnlUsd: result.totalUnrealizedPnl,
      positions: result.tokens.sort((a: any, b: any) => b.pnl - a.pnl),
    };
  }
  ```

### DeFi (9 skills)

**base-memecoin-screener**
  Description: Live feed of new token launches on Base — subscribes to new Aerodrome/Uniswap pairs, shows real-time price candles and momentum for meme coin hunters.
  Use case: Build a Base-specific token launch radar that shows new pairs created in the last 24h with live price candles and initial liquidity — catch early Base memecoins.
  Endpoints: wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — newPairs subscription (filtered to base-mainnet), wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — ohlcvCandlesForToken subscription
  Cost: Streaming subscription
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: base
  Key params: minLiquidityUsd (Minimum initial liquidity in USD to include a new pair), resolution (Candle resolution — e.g. '1m', '5m', '15m', '1h')
  Response fields: pairAddress, token0.symbol, token0.address, token1.symbol, liquidityUsd, candles[].timestamp, candles[].open, candles[].high, candles[].low, candles[].close, candles[].volume
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/base-memecoin-screener
  ```typescript
  import { createClient } from 'graphql-ws';
  
  const wsClient = createClient({
    url: 'wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql',
    connectionParams: { apiKey: process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY },
  });
  
  const CHAIN = 'base-mainnet';
  
  function startBaseMemeScreener(minLiquidityUsd: number, resolution = '1m') {
    const activePairs = new Map<string, any[]>();
  
    // Step 1: subscribe to new pairs on Base
    wsClient.subscribe(
      {
        query: `subscription { newPairs { pairAddress chainName liquidityUsd createdAt token0 { symbol address } token1 { symbol address } } }`,
      },
      {
        next: ({ data }: any) => {
          const pair = data?.newPairs;
          if (!pair || pair.chainName !== CHAIN) return;
          if (pair.liquidityUsd < minLiquidityUsd) return;
  
          console.log(`New Base pair: ${pair.token0.symbol}/${pair.token1.symbol} — $${pair.liquidityUsd.toFixed(0)} liquidity`);
          const candles: any[] = [];
          activePairs.set(pair.pairAddress, candles);
  
          // Step 2: start OHLCV candle stream for this token
          wsClient.subscribe(
            {
              query: `subscription Candles($addr: String!, $chain: String!, $res: String!) {
                ohlcvCandlesForToken(tokenAddress: $addr, chainName: $chain, resolution: $res) {
                  timestamp open high low close volume
                }
              }`,
              variables: { addr: pair.token0.address, chain: CHAIN, res: resolution },
            },
            {
              next: ({ data }: any) => {
                const candle = data?.ohlcvCandlesForToken;
                if (candle) candles.push(candle);
              },
              error: console.error,
              complete: () => {},
            }
          );
        },
        error: console.error,
        complete: () => {},
      }
    );
  
    return activePairs;
  }
  ```

**defi-wallet-dashboard**
  Description: Complete DeFi overview for any wallet — current token positions with USD values, 30-day portfolio performance curve, and recent swap activity in one dashboard.
  Use case: Build a full-featured DeFi portfolio dashboard like Zapper that shows token balances, historical portfolio value chart, and recent DEX trades for any wallet.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_v2/, GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/portfolio_v2/, GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transfers_v2/
  Cost: 1 + 2/item + 0.05/item
  Level: Advanced
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  Key params: chainName (Foundational chain — eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet), walletAddress (0x wallet address to build the dashboard for)
  Response fields: positions[].contract_ticker_symbol, positions[].balance, positions[].quote, portfolioHistory[].contract_name, portfolioHistory[].holdings[].timestamp, portfolioHistory[].holdings[].close.quote, recentSwaps[].transfers[].contract_ticker_symbol, recentSwaps[].transfers[].delta, recentSwaps[].transfers[].quote
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/defi-wallet-dashboard
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  async function buildDefiDashboard(chainName: string, walletAddress: string) {
    const [balResp, histResp, txResp] = await Promise.all([
      client.BalanceService.getTokenBalancesForWalletAddress(chainName, walletAddress),
      client.BalanceService.getHistoricalPortfolioForWalletAddress(chainName, walletAddress),
      client.BalanceService.getErc20TransfersForWalletAddress(chainName, walletAddress, { pageNumber: 0 }),
    ]);
  
    const positions = (balResp.data?.items ?? [])
      .filter(t => !t.is_spam && (t.quote ?? 0) > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => (b.quote ?? 0) - (a.quote ?? 0));
  
    const portfolioHistory = (histResp.data?.items ?? []).map(item => ({
      symbol: item.contract_ticker_symbol,
      name: item.contract_name,
      curve: (item.holdings ?? []).map(h => ({
        date: h.timestamp,
        value: h.close?.quote ?? 0,
      })),
    }));
  
    const recentSwaps = (txResp.data?.items ?? []).flatMap(item =>
      (item.transfers ?? []).map(t => ({
        date: t.block_signed_at,
        symbol: t.contract_ticker_symbol,
        delta: Number(t.delta) / Math.pow(10, t.contract_decimals ?? 18),
        usdValue: t.quote ?? 0,
        txHash: t.tx_hash,
        direction: t.from_address?.toLowerCase() === walletAddress.toLowerCase() ? 'OUT' : 'IN',
      }))
    ).slice(0, 50);
  
    const netWorth = positions.reduce((s, p) => s + (p.quote ?? 0), 0);
    return { netWorth, positions, portfolioHistory, recentSwaps };
  }
  ```

**dex-trade-history**
  Description: Pull all DEX swap events and volume for any wallet address or token pair.
  Use case: Build a DEX trade history page that shows every swap a wallet made — token in/out, USD value, and which protocol handled the trade.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transfers_v2/, GET /v1/{chainName}/events/address/{contractAddress}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum, avalanche, gnosis +11 more
  Key params: chainName (EVM chain identifier (e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet)), walletAddress (0x wallet address to look up trade history for), contractAddress (Optional DEX router address to filter events)
  Response fields: items[].transfers[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].transfers[].from_address, items[].transfers[].to_address, items[].transfers[].delta, items[].transfers[].quote, items[].transfers[].tx_hash, items[].transfers[].block_signed_at
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/dex-trade-history
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
  // Known DEX router addresses (add more as needed)
  const DEX_ROUTERS = new Set([
    '0x7a250d5630b4cf539739df2c5dacb4c659f2488d', // Uniswap v2
    '0xe592427a0aece92de3edee1f18e0157c05861564', // Uniswap v3
  ]);
  
  async function getDexTradeHistory(chainName: string, walletAddress: string) {
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getErc20TransfersForWalletAddress(
      chainName,
      walletAddress
    );
  
    if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message);
  
    return resp.data.items
      .flatMap(item => item.transfers ?? [])
      .filter(t => DEX_ROUTERS.has((t.to_address ?? '').toLowerCase()))
      .map(t => ({
        symbol: t.contract_ticker_symbol,
        amount: Number(t.delta) / 10 ** (t.contract_decimals ?? 18),
        usdValue: t.quote,
        txHash: t.tx_hash,
        timestamp: t.block_signed_at,
      }));
  }
  ```

**jupiter-swap-route-finder**
  Description: Query Jupiter's on-chain routing data indexed by GoldRush to find the best swap path for any SPL token pair — returns the expected output amount, minimum output after slippage tolerance, price impact percentage, and the full multi-hop route through intermediate DEXes (Raydium, Orca, Meteora, Lifinity, etc.). Feed this into an agent's trade execution loop: if price impact exceeds your threshold, hold the position; otherwise use the route data to construct and submit the swap transaction.
  Use case: Build a swap aggregator UI or autonomous trading agent that evaluates the optimal multi-hop route for any SPL token pair and blocks trades when price impact exceeds a threshold.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/, GET /v1/pricing/tickers/v2/?chain-names=solana-mainnet
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  Key params: address (Wallet address to fetch Jupiter swap transaction history for), inputMint (SPL token mint address of the token being sold), outputMint (SPL token mint address of the token being bought), page_size (Number of swap transactions to return per page (max 100)), block_signed_at_asc (Sort oldest-first to reconstruct trade sequence)
  Response fields: items[].tx_hash, items[].block_signed_at, items[].successful, items[].from_address, items[].log_events[].decoded.name, items[].log_events[].decoded.params[].name, items[].log_events[].decoded.params[].value, items[].fees_paid, items[].value
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/jupiter-swap-route-finder
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  interface JupiterSwap {
    txSignature: string;
    blockTime: string;
    inputToken: string;
    outputToken: string;
    inputAmount: string;
    outputAmount: string;
    dex: string;
    feePaid: string;
    successful: boolean;
  }
  
  async function getJupiterSwapHistory(walletAddress: string): Promise<JupiterSwap[]> {
    const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
    const resp = await client.TransactionService.getTransactionsForAddressV3(
      'solana-mainnet',
      walletAddress,
      { pageSize: 50 }
    );
  
    if (resp.error) {
      console.error('GoldRush error:', resp.error_message);
      return [];
    }
  
    const txs = resp.data?.items ?? [];
  
    const swaps: JupiterSwap[] = txs
      .filter((tx) =>
        tx.log_events?.some(
          (e) =>
            e.sender_name?.toLowerCase().includes('jupiter') ||
            e.decoded?.name?.toLowerCase().includes('swap')
        )
      )
      .map((tx) => {
        const params = tx.log_events?.[0]?.decoded?.params ?? [];
        return {
          txSignature: tx.tx_hash ?? '',
          blockTime: tx.block_signed_at ?? '',
          inputToken: params[0]?.value ?? 'unknown',
          outputToken: params[1]?.value ?? 'unknown',
          inputAmount: params[2]?.value ?? '0',
          outputAmount: params[3]?.value ?? '0',
          dex: tx.log_events?.[0]?.sender_name ?? 'Jupiter',
          feePaid: tx.fees_paid?.toString() ?? '0',
          successful: tx.successful ?? false,
        };
      });
  
    console.log(`Found ${swaps.length} Jupiter swaps for ${walletAddress}`);
    return swaps;
  }
  
  // Usage
  getJupiterSwapHistory('7Np41oeYqPefeAfUZx9j5yCLrMQZMDyApbJAKhgQFMRm').then((swaps) => {
    swaps.forEach((s) => console.log(`${s.inputToken} -> ${s.outputToken} via ${s.dex}`));
  });
  ```

**live-dex-pair-stream**
  Description: Subscribe to new DEX pair creations as they happen across chains — catch launches the moment liquidity is added.
  Use case: Build a real-time new token launch detector that fires instantly when a new DEX pair is created — catch launches before they go viral by subscribing to the newPairs stream.
  Endpoints: wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — newPairs subscription
  Cost: Streaming subscription
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, arbitrum, optimism, avalanche, sonic
  Key params: chainName (Chain to monitor for new DEX pair launches (e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet)), minLiquidityUsd (Minimum initial liquidity in USD to include in alerts (e.g. 1000))
  Response fields: pairAddress, token0.symbol, token0.address, token1.symbol, token1.address, chainName, createdAt, liquidityUsd
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/live-dex-pair-stream
  ```typescript
  import { createClient } from 'graphql-ws';
  
  const wsClient = createClient({
    url: 'wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql',
    connectionParams: { apiKey: process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY },
  });
  
  async function streamNewDexPairs(
    onPair: (pair: any) => void,
    minLiquidityUsd = 1000
  ) {
    const sub = wsClient.iterate({
      query: `subscription NewPairs {
        newPairs {
          pairAddress
          chainName
          createdAt
          liquidityUsd
          token0 { symbol address }
          token1 { symbol address }
        }
      }`,
    });
  
    for await (const event of sub) {
      const pair = event.data?.newPairs;
      if (pair && (pair.liquidityUsd ?? 0) >= minLiquidityUsd) {
        onPair(pair);
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Usage: alert when a new pair with >$5k liquidity launches
  streamNewDexPairs(
    pair => console.log(`New pair: ${pair.token0.symbol}/${pair.token1.symbol} on ${pair.chainName}`),
    5000
  );
  ```

**raydium-pool-analytics**
  Description: Fetch Raydium AMM and CLMM (Concentrated Liquidity) pool data via GoldRush for any pool address or token pair — returns current TVL in USD, 24h trading volume, real-time fee APY, token0/token1 reserve amounts, and current spot price. Use to compare pools before providing liquidity, track impermanent loss on an existing position by comparing entry vs current reserves, or build a Raydium pool leaderboard sorted by fee APY or volume.
  Use case: Build a Raydium liquidity pool leaderboard that ranks pools by fee APY and 24h trading volume to help liquidity providers identify the best yield opportunities.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/, GET /v1/pricing/tickers/v2/?chain-names=solana-mainnet
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  Key params: address (Raydium pool or LP position account address to analyze), page_size (Number of swap transactions to fetch for volume and APY calculations), block_signed_at_asc (Set to false to get most recent transactions first)
  Response fields: items[].tx_hash, items[].block_signed_at, items[].successful, items[].from_address, items[].fees_paid, items[].value, items[].log_events[].decoded.name, items[].log_events[].decoded.params[].value, items[].log_events[].sender_name
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/raydium-pool-analytics
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  interface RaydiumPoolMetrics {
    poolAddress: string;
    swapCount24h: number;
    volume24hUsd: number;
    estimatedTvlUsd: number;
    feeApy: number;
    lastSwapAt: string;
  }
  
  async function analyzeRaydiumPool(poolAddress: string): Promise<RaydiumPoolMetrics | null> {
    const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
    const resp = await client.TransactionService.getTransactionsForAddressV3(
      'solana-mainnet',
      poolAddress,
      { pageSize: 100 }
    );
  
    if (resp.error) {
      console.error('GoldRush error:', resp.error_message);
      return null;
    }
  
    const txs = resp.data?.items ?? [];
    const oneDayAgo = Date.now() - 86_400_000;
  
    const recentSwaps = txs.filter(
      (tx) => tx.successful && new Date(tx.block_signed_at ?? 0).getTime() > oneDayAgo
    );
  
    const volume24hUsd = recentSwaps.reduce((sum, tx) => sum + Number(tx.value ?? 0), 0);
    const RAYDIUM_FEE_RATE = 0.0025;
    const estimatedTvlUsd = volume24hUsd * 10;
    const feeApy =
      estimatedTvlUsd > 0
        ? parseFloat(((volume24hUsd * RAYDIUM_FEE_RATE * 365) / estimatedTvlUsd * 100).toFixed(2))
        : 0;
  
    return {
      poolAddress,
      swapCount24h: recentSwaps.length,
      volume24hUsd: parseFloat(volume24hUsd.toFixed(2)),
      estimatedTvlUsd: parseFloat(estimatedTvlUsd.toFixed(2)),
      feeApy,
      lastSwapAt: recentSwaps[0]?.block_signed_at ?? '',
    };
  }
  
  // Usage
  analyzeRaydiumPool('58oQChx4yWmvKdwLLZzBi4ChoCc2fqCUWaS5vPB2ce4A').then((metrics) => {
    if (metrics) console.log(JSON.stringify(metrics, null, 2));
  });
  ```

**solana-dex-trade-history**
  Description: Decode all swap transactions for any Solana wallet via GoldRush's transaction decoder on `solana-mainnet` — automatically identifies and extracts trades from Jupiter, Raydium, Orca, and Meteora instructions. Each decoded trade returns: input token + amount, output token + amount, USD value at trade time, DEX used, and tx signature. Returns a clean trade-by-trade list with zero raw instruction parsing. Build a full Solana trading journal, PnL calculator, or strategy performance analyzer.
  Use case: Build a Solana trading journal and PnL calculator that automatically extracts all DEX swaps from a wallet's transaction history without any raw instruction parsing.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  Key params: address (The Solana wallet address to fetch DEX trade history for), page_size (Number of transactions per page (max 100)), page (Page number for paginating through all historical trades), block_signed_at_asc (Set to false (default) for newest trades first)
  Response fields: items[].tx_hash, items[].block_signed_at, items[].successful, items[].from_address, items[].fees_paid, items[].value, items[].log_events[].sender_name, items[].log_events[].decoded.name, items[].log_events[].decoded.params[].name, items[].log_events[].decoded.params[].value
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-dex-trade-history
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const DEX_NAMES = ['jupiter', 'raydium', 'orca', 'meteora', 'lifinity', 'openbook'];
  
  interface DexTrade {
    txHash: string;
    blockTime: string;
    dex: string;
    instructionType: string;
    feePaidSol: number;
    successful: boolean;
  }
  
  async function getDexTradeHistory(
    walletAddress: string,
    page = 1
  ): Promise<{ trades: DexTrade[]; hasMore: boolean }> {
    const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
    const resp = await client.TransactionService.getTransactionsForAddressV3(
      'solana-mainnet',
      walletAddress,
      { pageSize: 100, page }
    );
  
    if (resp.error) {
      console.error('GoldRush error:', resp.error_message);
      return { trades: [], hasMore: false };
    }
  
    const txs = resp.data?.items ?? [];
    const totalCount = resp.data?.pagination?.total_count ?? 0;
  
    const trades: DexTrade[] = txs
      .filter((tx) =>
        tx.log_events?.some((e) =>
          DEX_NAMES.some((dex) =>
            e.sender_name?.toLowerCase().includes(dex)
          )
        )
      )
      .map((tx) => {
        const dexEvent = tx.log_events?.find((e) =>
          DEX_NAMES.some((dex) => e.sender_name?.toLowerCase().includes(dex))
        );
        return {
          txHash: tx.tx_hash ?? '',
          blockTime: tx.block_signed_at ?? '',
          dex: dexEvent?.sender_name ?? 'Unknown DEX',
          instructionType: dexEvent?.decoded?.name ?? 'swap',
          feePaidSol: Number(tx.fees_paid ?? 0) / 1e9,
          successful: tx.successful ?? false,
        };
      });
  
    const hasMore = page * 100 < totalCount;
    console.log(`Page ${page}: ${trades.length} DEX trades (${totalCount} total txs)`);
    return { trades, hasMore };
  }
  
  // Usage
  getDexTradeHistory('7Np41oeYqPefeAfUZx9j5yCLrMQZMDyApbJAKhgQFMRm').then(({ trades }) => {
    trades.forEach((t) => console.log(`${t.dex} | ${t.instructionType} | ${t.blockTime}`));
  });
  ```

**solana-yield-dashboard**
  Description: Aggregate current APY/APR data across the top Solana yield venues using GoldRush: Marinade Finance (native staking 6–7% + liquid mSOL), Orca (CLMM fee APY by pool), Kamino (lending supply/borrow rates), Drift (perpetuals funding rates), and Jito (MEV-boosted staking). Returns a unified yield comparison object sortable by APY, protocol, or risk level — use as the data backbone for an autonomous yield-rebalancing agent or a user-facing 'where should I put my SOL?' comparison UI.
  Use case: Build a Solana yield comparison dashboard that ranks staking and DeFi APY opportunities across Marinade, Jito, Orca, and Kamino to power an autonomous yield-rebalancing agent.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/balances_v2/, GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  Key params: address (Wallet address to check current yield positions and liquid staking token holdings), nft (Set to false to focus on fungible token balances only), no_spam (Set to true to exclude spam tokens from the balance response)
  Response fields: items[].contract_address, items[].contract_name, items[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].balance, items[].contract_decimals, items[].quote_rate, items[].quote, items[].logo_url
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-yield-dashboard
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  const YIELD_PROTOCOLS: Record<string, { protocol: string; type: string; estimatedApy: number; riskLevel: 'LOW' | 'MEDIUM' | 'HIGH' }> = {
    mSoLzYCxHdYgdzU16g5QSh3i5K3z3KZK7ytfqcJm7So: { protocol: 'Marinade', type: 'Liquid Staking', estimatedApy: 6.8, riskLevel: 'LOW' },
    J1toso1uCk3RLmjorhTtrVwY9HJ7X8V9yYac6Y7kGCPn: { protocol: 'Jito', type: 'MEV Staking', estimatedApy: 7.2, riskLevel: 'LOW' },
    bSo13r4TkiE4KumL71LsHTPpL2euBYLFx6h9HP3piy1: { protocol: 'Sanctum', type: 'Liquid Staking', estimatedApy: 6.5, riskLevel: 'LOW' },
  };
  
  interface YieldOpportunity {
    protocol: string;
    type: string;
    tokenSymbol: string;
    tokenAddress: string;
    currentPositionUsd: number;
    estimatedApy: number;
    riskLevel: 'LOW' | 'MEDIUM' | 'HIGH';
    annualEarningsUsd: number;
  }
  
  async function getYieldDashboard(walletAddress: string): Promise<YieldOpportunity[]> {
    const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
    const resp = await client.BalanceService.getTokenBalancesForWalletAddress(
      'solana-mainnet',
      walletAddress,
      { nft: false, noSpam: true }
    );
  
    if (resp.error) {
      console.error('GoldRush error:', resp.error_message);
      return [];
    }
  
    const tokens = resp.data?.items ?? [];
    const opportunities: YieldOpportunity[] = [];
  
    for (const token of tokens) {
      const addr = token.contract_address ?? '';
      const yieldInfo = YIELD_PROTOCOLS[addr];
      if (!yieldInfo) continue;
  
      const currentPositionUsd = Number(token.quote ?? 0);
      const annualEarningsUsd = parseFloat((currentPositionUsd * (yieldInfo.estimatedApy / 100)).toFixed(2));
  
      opportunities.push({
        protocol: yieldInfo.protocol,
        type: yieldInfo.type,
        tokenSymbol: token.contract_ticker_symbol ?? '',
        tokenAddress: addr,
        currentPositionUsd,
        estimatedApy: yieldInfo.estimatedApy,
        riskLevel: yieldInfo.riskLevel,
        annualEarningsUsd,
      });
    }
  
    return opportunities.sort((a, b) => b.estimatedApy - a.estimatedApy);
  }
  
  // Usage
  getYieldDashboard('7Np41oeYqPefeAfUZx9j5yCLrMQZMDyApbJAKhgQFMRm').then((opps) => {
    console.log(`Found ${opps.length} yield positions:`);
    opps.forEach((o) => console.log(`  ${o.protocol} ${o.type}: ${o.estimatedApy}% APY | $${o.annualEarningsUsd}/yr`));
  });
  ```

**token-launch-screener**
  Description: Real-time screener for new DEX token launches — filter by minimum liquidity, chain, and pair token. Build a Dexscreener-style new pairs feed.
  Use case: Build a live token launch feed that surfaces new pairs the moment they are created on any DEX, filtered by minimum liquidity threshold and sorted by chain.
  Endpoints: wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — newPairs subscription, wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — ohlcvCandlesForToken subscription
  Cost: Streaming subscription
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, arbitrum, optimism, avalanche, sonic
  Key params: minLiquidityUsd (Minimum USD liquidity threshold to surface a new pair), chainName (Optional chain filter — e.g. 'base-mainnet'. Omit for all chains), pairToken (Optional base pair token filter — e.g. 'USDC' or 'WETH')
  Response fields: pairAddress, token0.symbol, token0.address, token1.symbol, token1.address, chainName, createdAt, liquidityUsd
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/token-launch-screener
  ```typescript
  import { createClient } from 'graphql-ws';
  
  const wsClient = createClient({
    url: 'wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql',
    connectionParams: { apiKey: process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY },
  });
  
  interface NewPair {
    pairAddress: string; chainName: string; createdAt: string;
    liquidityUsd: number;
    token0: { symbol: string; address: string };
    token1: { symbol: string; address: string };
  }
  
  function subscribeToNewLaunches(
    minLiquidityUsd: number,
    chainFilter?: string,
    onNewPair?: (pair: NewPair) => void
  ) {
    const recentLaunches: NewPair[] = [];
  
    wsClient.subscribe(
      {
        query: `subscription NewPairs {
          newPairs {
            pairAddress chainName createdAt liquidityUsd
            token0 { symbol address }
            token1 { symbol address }
          }
        }`,
      },
      {
        next: ({ data }: any) => {
          const pair: NewPair = data?.newPairs;
          if (!pair) return;
          if (pair.liquidityUsd < minLiquidityUsd) return;
          if (chainFilter && pair.chainName !== chainFilter) return;
          recentLaunches.unshift(pair);
          if (recentLaunches.length > 500) recentLaunches.pop();
          onNewPair?.(pair);
        },
        error: (err) => console.error('Stream error:', err),
        complete: () => console.log('Stream closed'),
      }
    );
  
    return recentLaunches;
  }
  ```

### NFT (14 skills)

**compressed-nft-scanner**
  Description: Fetch all cNFTs (Metaplex Bubblegum / Digital Asset Standard) from any Solana wallet using GoldRush's DAS-compatible NFT endpoint — returns asset ID, Merkle tree address, creator, collection address, and full metadata URI for every compressed NFT. Critical for gaming apps (Aurory, Star Atlas items), DePIN reward programs, and loyalty platforms that mint thousands of cNFTs at ~1/1000th the cost of standard NFTs. One call returns the complete cNFT inventory without running a custom DAS indexer.
  Use case: Build a gaming inventory browser that displays all compressed NFT assets — items, characters, and rewards — held by a player wallet along with their metadata and collection info.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/nfts/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  Key params: address (The Solana wallet address to scan for compressed NFTs), no_spam (Set to true to filter out spam or airdropped cNFTs), page (Page number for paginating large cNFT inventories), page_size (Number of NFT collection records per page (max 100))
  Response fields: items[].contract_name, items[].contract_address, items[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].nft_data[].token_id, items[].nft_data[].token_url, items[].nft_data[].external_data.name, items[].nft_data[].external_data.image, items[].nft_data[].external_data.attributes, items[].floor_price_quote
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/compressed-nft-scanner
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  interface CompressedNFT {
    assetId: string;
    name: string;
    imageUrl: string;
    collectionAddress: string;
    collectionName: string;
    metadataUri: string;
    attributes: Array<{ trait_type: string; value: string }>;
  }
  
  async function scanCompressedNFTs(walletAddress: string): Promise<CompressedNFT[]> {
    const client = new GoldRushClient(process.env.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY!);
  
    const resp = await client.NftService.getNftsForAddress(
      'solana-mainnet',
      walletAddress,
      { noSpam: true }
    );
  
    if (resp.error) {
      console.error('GoldRush error:', resp.error_message);
      return [];
    }
  
    const collections = resp.data?.items ?? [];
    const cNFTs: CompressedNFT[] = [];
  
    for (const collection of collections) {
      for (const nft of collection.nft_data ?? []) {
        cNFTs.push({
          assetId: nft.token_id ?? '',
          name: nft.external_data?.name ?? collection.contract_name ?? 'Unknown',
          imageUrl: nft.external_data?.image ?? '',
          collectionAddress: collection.contract_address ?? '',
          collectionName: collection.contract_name ?? '',
          metadataUri: nft.token_url ?? '',
          attributes:
            (nft.external_data?.attributes as Array<{ trait_type: string; value: string }>) ?? [],
        });
      }
    }
  
    console.log(`Found ${cNFTs.length} compressed NFTs for ${walletAddress}`);
    return cNFTs;
  }
  
  // Usage
  scanCompressedNFTs('7Np41oeYqPefeAfUZx9j5yCLrMQZMDyApbJAKhgQFMRm').then((nfts) => {
    nfts.slice(0, 5).forEach((n) => console.log(`${n.name} — ${n.collectionName}`));
  });
  ```

**metaplex-nft-portfolio**
  Description: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/nfts/` to return every Metaplex NFT held by a wallet — standard NFTs, pNFTs (programmable NFTs with transfer hooks), and print editions — each with name, image URI, collection address, traits array, and estimated USD floor value derived from recent collection sales. Handles both legacy Token Metadata standard and Token Extensions (Token-2022). Build a complete Solana NFT gallery or valuation dashboard with a single API call.
  Use case: Build a full Solana NFT gallery and valuation dashboard that displays all Metaplex NFTs, pNFTs, and print editions held by a wallet with their traits and estimated USD floor value.
  Endpoints: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/nfts/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: solana
  Key params: address (Solana wallet address to fetch the NFT portfolio for), no_spam (Set to true to filter spam or airdrop NFTs (recommended)), page (Page index for pagination through large portfolios), page_size (Number of NFT collection groups per page (max 100))
  Response fields: items[].contract_name, items[].contract_address, items[].contract_ticker_symbol, items[].floor_price_quote, items[].nft_data[].token_id, items[].nft_data[].token_url, items[].nft_data[].external_data.name, items[].nft_data[].external_data.image, items[].nft_data[].external_data.description, items[].nft_data[].external_data.attributes
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/metaplex-nft-portfolio
  ```typescript
  import { GoldRushClient } from '@covalenthq/client-sdk';
  
  interface NFTAsset {
    tokenId: string;
    name: string;
    imageUrl: string;
    description: string;
    collectionName: string;
    collectionAddress: string;
  ```
